notableEvents.label: Nico Hoerner GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner grounds into a double play, third baseman Ke'Bryan Hayes to second baseman Sal Stewart to first baseman Spencer Steer. Pete Crow-Armstrong to 3rd. Miguel Amaya out at 2nd. Nico Hoerner out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nico Hoerner rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner grounds into a double play, third baseman Ke'Bryan Hayes to second baseman Sal Stewart to first baseman Spencer Steer. Pete Crow-Armstrong to 3rd. Miguel Amaya out at 2nd. Nico Hoerner out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Steer reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Dansby Swanson.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Steer reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Steer reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Dansby Swanson.

notableEvents.label: Nathaniel Lowe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nathaniel Lowe challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Nathaniel Lowe called out on strikes.
